Fixture Fallback Chili

Serves 4

Prep time: 10 minutes

Cook time: 30 minutes

Ingredients

  • 1 pound ground beef
  • 1 can tomatoes
  • 2 teaspoons chili powder

Instructions

  1. Brown the beef.
  2. Add tomatoes and chili powder.
  3. Simmer for 30 minutes.

Great recipe! This must not be imported.
